title: 🔥宏观避险压制估值
body: 市场处于宏观流动性压制阶段。BMRI 报 71，显示资金处于 RISK_OFF 状态。虽然 AHR999 为 0.33 已进入抄底区，但价格 7 日仍下跌 12.1%，说明宏观悲观情绪盖过了链上低估值的吸引力。抄底信号暂时失效，需等待宏观面改善。风险偏好何时回暖？
body_en: The market is stuck in a phase of macro liquidity suppression. BMRI sits at 71, signaling that capital is firmly in RISK_OFF mode. While AHR999 has dropped to 0.33—officially entering accumulation territory—prices are still down 12.1% over the past 7 days. This tells us macro pessimism is overpowering the appeal of on-chain undervaluation. Buy signals are temporarily offline until the macro backdrop improves. When will risk appetite return?
